manufacturer_from_details: ‎ SANCTink toner cartridge for Xerox C310 C315
features: 1. Compatible printer: for XEROX C310 C315 C310DNI C310DNIM C315DNI Toner Printer

2. Package Includes: 4 Pack Remanufactured Toner Cartridge for 1 pack Black toner cartridge 006R04356), 1 pack Cyan toner cartridge (006R04357), 1 pack Yellow toner cartridge(006R04359), 1 pack Magenta toner cartridge (006R04358).
3. High Page Yield: High yield 3000 pages per Black toner cartridge; 2000 pages per color toner cartridge at 5% coverage of A4 Paper. (depends on printer and usage)
4. Quality Assurance: One-year warranty, please be assured use.（If there is any issues whatsoever with your order, please feel free to contact us, we would as soon as to solve your problem for you.）
5. Advantages: Strict Quality Control, crisp and clear texts, vibrant color.
